detail.description: Alek Thomas doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Alek Thomas doubles (8) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Nolan Arenado to 3rd.
Alek Thomas homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Alek Thomas singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Everson Pereira.
Alek Thomas doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Alek Thomas singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jesús Sánchez. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.
Alek Thomas doubles (6) on a ground ball to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Jose Fernandez scores.
Alek Thomas singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II.
Alek Thomas doubles (3) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Riley Greene. Gabriel Moreno scores. Nolan Arenado to 3rd.
Alek Thomas doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Alek Thomas singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Jesús Luzardo. Jose Fernandez to 3rd. Tim Tawa to 2nd.

Alek Thomas doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Pavin Smith scores. Carlos Santana scores. Alek Thomas out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Kyle Tucker to second baseman Alex Freeland to third baseman Max Muncy.

Alek Thomas doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Gabriel Moreno scores. Pavin Smith out at home on the throw, right fielder Kyle Tucker to second baseman Alex Freeland to catcher Will Smith.
Alek Thomas doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Weston Wilson.
